title: CTR-ID Unified Protocol v0.1
description: JSON Schema for the minimal interoperable identifier profile used with Communication-Trace-Record (CTR) compatible systems.

event_record_id.description: Unique identifier of this serialized record instance.

trace_event_id.description: Stable identifier of the traceable event node.

parent_trace_event_id.description: Optional preferred direct parent trace event.

derived_from_trace_ids.description: Optional multi-parent lineage references for merge, synthesis, or multi-source derivation cases.

communication_id.description: Shared identifier for the communication object or exchange unit.

session_id.description: Runtime session identifier defined by the issuing system.

thread_id.description: Runtime thread identifier defined by the issuing system.

conversation_root_id.description: Root identifier for the larger conversation tree.

artifact_id.description: Optional identifier for a persisted output artifact.

structure_refs.description: Optional references to higher-order meaning structures or semantic continuity anchors.

structure_id.description: Identifier for a higher-order meaning structure.

relation.description: Declared relation between the trace event and the referenced structure.

role.description: Optional semantic role of the structure reference.

confidence.description: Optional confidence score for the asserted structure relation.

note.description: Optional human-readable note about the structure reference.

structure_refs.note: Core semantic structure persists across summary transformation.
